starter_collections.title: Recipes
starter_collections.description: Dishes, cooking ideas, restaurant-inspired meals, grocery notes, and kitchen tips you may want to find again.

starter_collections.title: Movies & Shows
starter_collections.description: Films, series, trailers, reviews, and recommendations about movies, shows, performers, and media titles.

starter_collections.title: Restaurants & Cafes
starter_collections.description: Named restaurants, cafes, bars, bakeries, dining maps/place links, menus, reviews, and food-place lists. Prefer this over Local Activities for concrete places to eat or drink.

starter_collections.title: Products
starter_collections.description: Clothing, gifts, gear, home items, tools, and comparisons you are considering or want to revisit.

starter_collections.title: Articles & Guides
starter_collections.description: Long reads, how-tos, explainers, reference pages, and practical guides saved for later use.

starter_collections.title: Events & Tickets
starter_collections.description: Specific time-bound events, concerts, workshops, performances, ticket pages, event schedules, venues for an event, and attendable activities. Not for regular places or attractions merely because hours or admission are mentioned.

starter_collections.title: Travel & Trips
starter_collections.description: Trip planning, destinations, hotels, itineraries, travel logistics, attractions, city guides, and saved ideas for future travel.

starter_collections.title: Fitness & Health
starter_collections.description: Workouts, wellness routines, physical therapy, health advice, medical admin, classes, recovery, and fitness gear or habits.

starter_collections.title: Home & DIY
starter_collections.description: Home projects, repairs, decor, cleaning, gardening, organization, crafts, tools, and do-it-yourself build instructions.

starter_collections.title: Books & Reading
starter_collections.description: Books, authors, reading lists, literary recommendations, articles about books, bookstores, and things to read later.

starter_collections.title: Music & Podcasts
starter_collections.description: Songs, albums, artists, playlists, concerts as media interest, podcast episodes, audio shows, and listening recommendations.

starter_collections.title: Software & Apps
starter_collections.description: Apps, app-store listings, SaaS products, software tools, developer libraries, GitHub repositories, technical docs, and software workflows, even when the app is about restaurants, media, travel, or shopping.

starter_collections.title: Design Inspiration
starter_collections.description: Visual references, UI patterns, interiors, fashion looks, brand systems, creative direction, and aesthetic examples to revisit.

starter_collections.title: Work & Career
starter_collections.description: Professional development, job search, management, business operations, productivity, workplace skills, and career planning.

starter_collections.title: Personal Finance
starter_collections.description: Budgeting, taxes, investing, insurance, banking, deals with financial decisions, subscriptions, and money administration.

starter_collections.title: Parenting & Family
starter_collections.description: Childcare, school, family logistics, activities for kids, parenting advice, family purchases, and household coordination.

starter_collections.title: Beauty & Skincare
starter_collections.description: Skincare routines, cosmetics, haircare, beauty products, dermatology tips, grooming advice, and product recommendations.

starter_collections.title: Local Activities
starter_collections.description: Nearby non-dining, non-ticketed things to do such as museums, parks, pop-ups, seasonal outings, and neighborhood ideas. Prefer more specific Collections for restaurants, events, travel, fitness, courses, products, or apps.

starter_collections.title: Gift Ideas
starter_collections.description: Potential gifts, wishlists, presents for specific people, holiday shopping ideas, and thoughtful items to consider later.

starter_collections.title: Classes & Courses
starter_collections.description: Courses, workshops, tutorials, lessons, training programs, educational events, and skill-building opportunities to enroll in.

queries.query: public short-form social video posts about restaurants travel tips recipes workouts products or events
queries.expected_reminder_surface: when the post includes a concrete future event date or deadline
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: when the post names a concrete venue, restaurant, shop, park, hotel, or event location

queries.query: public reels shorts or TikTok videos with practical how-to advice worth saving for later
public social video posts recommending specific cafes shops venues or places to visit
public Instagram posts or Pinterest pins about products outfits interiors gifts or visual inspiration
public social image posts or pins about recipes restaurants travel itineraries or places to save
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: when the post names a concrete restaurant, cafe, hotel, venue, or destination

queries.query: Reddit discussion threads with recommendations advice trip planning gear products restaurants recipes or learning resources
community forum questions and answers that someone might save as a reference for a project
forum threads with hobby recommendations buying advice travel suggestions cooking tips or local ideas
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: when the thread recommends a concrete real-world place

queries.query: practical guides explainers how-to articles checklists and tutorials worth saving for later
consumer articles about travel planning food home health finance parenting shopping or personal projects
queries.expected_reminder_surface: when the guide includes a future deadline, schedule, or time window

queries.query: reference documentation pages tutorials or implementation guides for software product or creative projects
product pages for gifts gear home items clothing tools electronics or products someone might compare later
product reviews comparisons buying guides and recommendation pages for consumer purchases
independent brand product pages for bags shoes kitchen gear furniture clothing or travel accessories
specific restaurants cafes museums parks hotels shops or venues someone might save to visit
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: specific maps-searchable venue, business, restaurant, shop, park, hotel, or event venue

queries.query: event pages concerts workshops festivals talks exhibits markets or activities with dates and locations
queries.expected_reminder_surface: event date, deadline, or time window

queries.query: travel itinerary pages neighborhood guides city guides and destination lists with concrete places
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: named place inside itinerary or destination list

queries.query: recipe pages with ingredients cooking instructions meal ideas desserts weeknight dinners or baking projects
restaurant lists food guides menu pages or dining recommendations someone might save for later
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: named restaurant, cafe, market, or food venue

queries.query: movie show documentary podcast book or music recommendations reviews trailers and watch-later pages
official streaming video music podcast book or creator pages someone may want to revisit
restaurant menu PDF event brochure schedule price list or local service document
queries.expected_reminder_surface: when the document includes a concrete event date, booking date, or schedule
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: named local venue, restaurant, cafe, class, or service location

queries.query: local service pages classes appointments workshops schedules policies or booking information
queries.expected_reminder_surface: class, appointment, workshop, booking, deadline, or schedule

queries.query: public shortened URLs and share links that redirect to articles videos products or events
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: only when the resolved URL is a maps-searchable place

queries.query: Google Maps share links for restaurants cafes shops parks hotels venues or places someone might save to visit
queries.expected_visit_target_surface: Google Maps or maps.app.goo.gl place link

queries.query: public links that may have weak metadata login gates app share URLs or limited public previews
